mapper.select:
select tourism.*, coalesce(order_stats.orderNum, 0) as orderNum from tourism left join ( select tourism_id, sum(num) as orderNum from orders group by tourism_id ) order_stats on tourism.id = order_stats.tourism_id
and tourism.name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
order by orderNum desc order by tourism.id desc
order by tourism.id desc

select tourism.*, coalesce(order_stats.orderNum, 0) as orderNum from tourism left join ( select tourism_id, sum(num) as orderNum from orders group by tourism_id ) order_stats on tourism.id = order_stats.tourism_id
and tourism.name like concat('%', #{query.name}, '%')
order by orderNum desc order by tourism.id desc
order by tourism.id desc
